name: ks-ssh
description: Modern stylish powerful ssh by KS Warrior

scripts.cp: cp node_modules/xterm/lib/xterm.js src/public/js/xterm.js && cp node_modules/xterm/css/xterm.css src/public/css/xterm.css && cp node_modules/xterm-addon-fit/lib/xterm-addon-fit.js src/public/js/xterm-addon-fit.js && cp node_modules/socket.io/client-dist/socket.io.min.js src/public/js/socket.io.min.js

author: You
